title: MobVariants+
description: This experimental mod brings the elite monster affixes and dynamic halos of Diablo II style into the original Minecraft battles. This is a project born from AI collaboration, which serves as both a technical demonstration and a learning case for
body:
This experimental mod brings Diablo 2-style elite monster affixes and dynamic auras into vanilla Minecraft combat. Born from an AI collaboration, this project serves both as a technical demonstration and a cautionary case study in mod architecture.

The mod features comprehensive configuration files. All monster equipment weights, spawn probabilities, and variant toggles can be customized via configs. Don't worry if you don't know where to find these files - the mod configuration page displays the full file path.

A world level system has been implemented, with chat notifications appearing each time you log in or when your level increases.

Nearly all hostile mobs in the world grow stronger as levels rise - donning better armor, wielding improved weapons, etc. As world stages advance, monsters also gain increased equipment drop rates.

The core mechanic revolves around elite monster affixes:

The mod introduces four affix categories:

Blue Affixes:
Berserker, Fanatic, Possessed, Ghostly, Zealot, Corrupted, Crusher, Soul Rend, Flesh Reviver

Elemental Affixes:
Cold Enchanted, Fire Enchanted, Lightning Enchanted, Poison Enchanted

Non-Elemental Affixes:
Teleportation, Extra Fast, Stone Skin, Spectral Hit, Extra Strong, Elemental Resist

Aura Affixes:
Prayer Aura, Might Aura, Blessed Aim Aura, Holy Freeze Aura, Defiance Aura, Holy Fire Aura, Holy Shock Aura, Concentration Aura, Fanaticism Aura, Thorns Aura, Redemption Aura, Cleansing Aura, Conviction Aura, Resistance Aura

The mod includes comprehensive commands, allowing you to spawn any supported mob with any affix combination.

Important Notes:
• The built-in ally identification system is currently bugged and doesn't distinguish between friends and foes
• The mod architecture has fundamental issues - avoid modifying source code unless you're highly experienced, as this will exacerbate existing structural problems
• Do not use commands to spawn monsters with all affixes simultaneously, as this may cause random crashes

这款实验性模组将《暗黑破坏神2》风格的精英怪词缀和动态光环带入原版Minecraft战斗。这是一个AI协作诞生的项目，既是技术演示，也是模组架构的反面学习案例。
本模组具有全面的配置文件，怪物所有的装备权重，生成概率，是否开启变体均能在配置文件自定义，不知道配置文件在哪的也不用担心，在模组配置页面会告诉你文件路径
世界添加了世界等级，每次进入游戏和提升等级会有语音栏提示
世界几乎所有具有攻击能力的生物均会随着等级提高而变强，穿更好的护甲使用更好的武器等等，随着阶段等级提升，怪物的装备掉落概率也会提高
模组最核心的其实是精英怪词缀
模组添加了四种词缀
蓝色词缀：头目、狂战士、着魔者、厉魂、狂信者、腐行者、碾压者、裂魂、血肉复生者
元素词缀：冰冻强化,火焰强化,闪电强化,剧毒强化
非元素词缀：传送,特别快速,皮肤硬化，幽灵一击，特别强状，元素抵抗
光环词缀：祈祷光环、力量光环、祝福瞄准光环、神圣冰冻光环、反抗光环、神圣火焰光环、神圣电击光环、专注光环、狂热光环、荆棘光环、救赎光环、净化光环、审判光环、
魔法抵抗光环
模组有全面的指令，可以通过指令生成任何支持词缀系统的生物携带任何词缀
注意事项（重要！）
模组内置了友方单位识别系统（现在有bug，完全不分敌友）
模组架构有问题，如果不是有强大的实力请不要修改源码并运行，这会使本来就混乱的架构雪上加霜
请不要使用指令生成全词缀生物，否则模组有小概率会崩溃
